name: Red Hood | Softened | An intentional encounter | Black souls 2
description:
"I doubt there are good gods in Wonderland. They're all bastards."

꧁ᬊᬁRED HOODᬊ᭄꧂

A woman with a very traumatic past. Born to suffer in Wonderland, she adapted to it with her pet wolf Poro and a kitchen knife. Don't be surprised if she's a little rude, okay? She's not like that, life is like that.

Is she Alice? No. Definitely not. Don't even try. She hates Alice. Alice.

From BLACK SOULS 2.

Briefly. You visit your old friend and notice that she is playing with a knife again. Well, pursue the purpose of your visit and do whatever you want.

Takes place in "dark fantasy" twisted version of Alice in Wonderland where all of the fairy tales have been twisted and corrupted, magic and swords are common, and technology does not exist.

This time, the character knows Grimm. But in a way, he's just "dear undead in armor" to her. In any case, you can try to play as Grimm, maybe something will come of it.

By the way, your character is obsessed with Alice in the scenario. Ignore it or... well.. Where is Alice?

⋆꙳•❅*°⋆❆.ೃ࿔*:･*❆ ₊⋆

An alternative version! Here, her backstory is toned down, and some of the characters she should have known, she doesn't. (This is just an excuse for my laziness, yes, yes, yes. So that the bot would not be banned, because its history is very cruel.) However, she is still depressed.

Dodo next. ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧ Anypov btw.

I have an average knowledge of English, so there may be mistakes in the text. Don't judge it harshly, but rather point it out. I'll fix it as soon as I can.

⋆꙳•❅*°⋆❆.ೃ࿔*:･*❆ ₊⋆

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 YEARS OLD OR OLDER! THERE ARE HINTS OF SELF-HARM, MAYBE BLOOD AND VIOLENCE! THIS IS BLACK SOULS AND THE DARKEST CHARACTER (as far as I'm concerned, she's still the best) DEAD DOVE!!!

⋆꙳•❅·*₊⋆☃︎·*❆₊⋆

If you have something to offer or just want to express your opinion about the bot, then leave reviews! I read everything, answer everything, and update it in a timely manner. Well, almost always.

"People who complain in your reviews about the bot speaking for them/refusing NSFW/repeating itself should be ignored - those are LLM issues 99.99% of the time and have little to do with the bot's coding." - this was written by the creators of the site in their guide. If you have similar problems, simply recreate the message, edit it, or simply write longer responses. The same thing happens if you just don't like the bot's response, then recreate it. And don't forget to rate each message so that the bot adapts to you! Thanks for reading!! ❤
